summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Medora Lab portal (mock store / localStorage). Verified routing, dashboard, sidebar, role switcher, orders drawer, collection mark-collected & reject, processing parameter entry with flags+draft+submit, validation queue (technician disabled / supervisor approve & release), preview report modal, cross-flow (LO-100236 ordered→processing→validation→validated and KPI 'Released today' incremented 2→3), catalog/samples/reports (CSV download)/settings, and reset-seed. All critical flows pass.

issues: React console error: 'key' prop is being spread via {...n} on NavItem in /app/frontend/src/lab/LabShell.jsx lines 102-108 and 115-117. Pass key directly: <NavItem key={n.key} testid={...} {...n} /> with key extracted to top-level. Functional but emits ~7 console errors on every render.

Radix a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent'. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to dialogs in Collection.jsx (collect-dialog, reject-collect-dialog) and Orders.jsx (cancel-dialog).

action_items: Fix NavItem key-spread React warning in LabShell.jsx (extract `key` out of the spread so it isn't part of `...n`).
Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to DialogContent components used in Collection and Orders to remove Radix a11y console warnings.

(Optional) Drawer 'Cancel order' button (data-testid=drawer-cancel-btn) was reported by Playwright as 'outside of the viewport' once although visually rendered — consider stabilising drawer layout / scroll for more reliable click targeting in tests.
critical_code_review_comments: store.jsx persistence: useEffect serialises full state on every change AFTER `resetSeed` clears localStorage, so storage is immediately rewritten with `initialState`. Functionally correct (seed restored) but the storage isn't truly empty after reset. Not a bug; document behaviour.
Spread-with-key anti-pattern in NavItem rendering (LabShell.jsx) — React 18+/19 logs error on every mount. Trivial fix.
Several DialogContent usages lack DialogDescription causing Radix a11y warnings.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing SEED_ORDERS from mockData.js (LO-100245..LO-100228).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is pure-frontend with localStorage key `medora_lab_store_v1`. To reset: click [data-testid=reset-seed-btn] OR evaluate localStorage.removeItem(...). Test orders by id: LO-100245/244/243 = ordered, LO-100240/239 = collected, LO-100236 = processing, LO-100231/228 = validated. Validation page requires role=lab_supervisor to enable approve/reject. Initial role from seed is lab_supervisor. Preview report modal opens via [data-testid=preview-report-btn] and contains [data-testid=print-report-btn]. Reports CSV export filename pattern: medora-lab-orders-{ts}.csv.
rca of the issue: No bugs found; only minor console warnings (key-in-spread on NavItem, DialogContent missing aria description). Both are cosmetic/console-only and don't block any user flow.
